title: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering
abstractNote: We introduce 3D Gaussian Splatting, a real-time radiance field rendering method that achieves state-of-the-art visual quality while maintaining competitive training times. Our method represents scenes with 3D Gaussians that preserve properties of volumetric radiance fields while enabling efficient differentiable rasterization.

title: GS-SLAM: Dense Visual SLAM with 3D Gaussian Splatting
publicationTitle: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2024)
abstractNote: We present GS-SLAM, a novel dense visual SLAM system that leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting for efficient and accurate scene representation. Our method achieves real-time performance while maintaining high-quality reconstruction and camera tracking accuracy.

title: SplaTAM: Splat, Track & Map 3D Gaussians for Dense RGB-D SLAM
publicationTitle: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2024)
abstractNote: We propose SplaTAM, a system for dense RGB-D SLAM that uses 3D Gaussian representations for joint camera tracking and dense mapping. Our key insight is that 3D Gaussians can be used as the unified scene representation for both tracking and mapping.

title: Gaussian-SLAM: Photo-realistic Dense SLAM with Gaussian Splatting
abstractNote: We introduce Gaussian-SLAM, a photo-realistic dense SLAM method using 3D Gaussian Splatting for novel view synthesis and high-fidelity scene reconstruction. Our method enables real-time camera tracking and mapping.

title: Photo-SLAM: Real-time Simultaneous Localization and Photorealistic Mapping
abstractNote: We propose Photo-SLAM, a real-time simultaneous localization and photorealistic mapping system built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. Our system achieves online photorealistic mapping with competitive tracking accuracy.

title: CG-SLAM: Efficient Dense RGB-D SLAM in a Consistent Uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Field
abstractNote: CG-SLAM introduces an uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian field for efficient dense RGB-D SLAM. The method achieves robust tracking and high-quality mapping through consistent Gaussian initialization and optimization strategies.

title: Point-SLAM: Dense Neural Point Cloud-based SLAM
publicationTitle: IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV 2023)
abstractNote: We propose Point-SLAM, a dense neural point cloud-based SLAM method. While using neural points rather than 3D Gaussians, our method shares the goal of dense real-time scene reconstruction for SLAM.

title: NICE-SLAM: Neural Implicit Scalable Encoding for SLAM
publicationTitle: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
abstractNote: NICE-SLAM introduces a hierarchical neural implicit scene representation for dense SLAM. As a precursor to Gaussian-based methods, it demonstrates the value of learnable scene representations for SLAM.

title: Orbeez-SLAM: A Real-time Monocular Visual SLAM with ORB Features and Neural Radiance Fields
publicationTitle: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstractNote: Orbeez-SLAM combines ORB features with neural radiance fields for real-time monocular SLAM, bridging traditional feature-based methods with neural scene representations.

title: RTG-SLAM: Real-time 3D Reconstruction at Scale using Gaussian Splatting
abstractNote: RTG-SLAM introduces a real-time large-scale 3D reconstruction system using Gaussian splatting. The method achieves up to 100 FPS with state-of-the-art reconstruction quality.

title: SemGauss-SLAM: Semantic Gaussian Splatting for Dense Visual SLAM
abstractNote: SemGauss-SLAM incorporates semantic information into 3D Gaussian Splatting for dense visual SLAM, enabling object-level understanding alongside geometric reconstruction.

title: GO-SLAM: Global Optimization for Consistent 3D Instant Reconstruction
publicationTitle: IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV 2023)
abstractNote: GO-SLAM presents a real-time dense SLAM system using neural implicit representations with global bundle adjustment, achieving robust tracking and consistent reconstruction.

title: GaussianFormer: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Online 3D Semantic Scene Understanding
abstractNote: GaussianFormer adapts 3D Gaussian Splatting for online semantic scene understanding, demonstrating the versatility of Gaussian representations beyond pure rendering.

title: Hi-Map: Hierarchical Factorized Radiance Field for Real-time SLAM
publicationTitle: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2024)
abstractNote: Hi-Map proposes a hierarchical factorized radiance field for real-time SLAM, demonstrating alternative approaches to neural scene representation for simultaneous localization and mapping.

title: DROID-SLAM: Deep Visual SLAM for Monocular, Stereo, and RGB-D Cameras
publicationTitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021)
abstractNote: DROID-SLAM is a deep learning-based SLAM system achieving strong performance through recurrent iterative updates of camera pose and depth, representing the deep SLAM paradigm prior to 3D Gaussian methods.
